layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing (p-6, p-8) for user side, Dense Control Room grid for Admin.
layout_and_spacing.user_layout: Clean light theme. Dark navy sidebar on desktop. Cream #FDFAF4 background.
layout_and_spacing.admin_layout: Strict grid hierarchy. gap-4 or gap-6. Flat solid surfaces with 1px subtle borders.
layout_and_spacing.borders: User side: rounded-xl. Admin side: rounded-lg or sharp corners with 1px border.

components_customization.buttons: Primary: bg-[#C4973B] text-[#0A0F1A] hover:bg-[#A98232]. Secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#0E2240] text-[#0E2240] (User) / border-[#C4973B] text-[#C4973B] (Admin).
components_customization.cards_user: bg-[#FDFAF4] border border-[#0E2240]/10 shadow-sm rounded-xl p-6. Hover: shadow-md -translate-y-1 transition-transform.
components_customization.event_card_badges: Live/Tonight: bg-[#C4973B] text-[#0A0F1A] text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1 rounded.
components_customization.capacity_bar: h-2 rounded-full bg-gray-200 (User) or bg-gray-800 (Admin) with fill color #C4973B.
components_customization.sidebar: User: bg-[#0E2240] text-[#FDFAF4]. Admin: bg-[#0A0F1A] border-r border-[#FDFAF4]/10.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Cards lift (-translate-y-1). Buttons darken or glow. Text color explicitly set on hover.

image_urls.description: Cream pinstripe background for user side auth/onboarding screens.
Dark map background for map screen placeholders or admin.
Concert crowd for music event cards.
Food festival crowd for food event cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='event-card-1').
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for structural layout and Shadcn UI for complex interactives (dropdowns, dialogs).
Implement the Leaflet map with dark theme tiles for Admin and light/custom tiles for User.
Ensure the user interface is light theme with Cream #FDFAF4 background, but the sidebar is dark Navy #0E2240.
Ensure the admin portal is strictly dark mode with Navy #0A0F1A background, Gold #C4973B accents, and 1px borders.
Onboarding quiz (6 steps) should be implemented as a clean stepper form.
Event cards must densely pack title, venue, badge, capacity bar, crowd count, distance, and parking info without looking cluttered. Use grid layouts within the card.
Avoid using Shadcn Card component if it restricts custom spacing/borders too much; use pure div for event cards if needed.
